name: The Phantom Kickoff
effect: Schedule and deliver an energizing kickoff meeting. This card is considered launched.

clauses.name: ALIGNMENT CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If all stakeholders attend: The project is considered aligned.

clauses.name: EVAPORATION EFFECT
clauses.rule: If no follow-up is scheduled: All momentum is considered transferred to the next kickoff.

clauses.name: FORGETFULNESS OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: Next sprint: No one remembers what was decided.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Was there ever a second meeting?

image_sign_text: WE ARE ALIGNED. WE ARE MOVING.
